title: Cutlery Set, BEWOS 16 Piece Matt Black Stainless Steel Flatware Set, Silverware Tableware Set with Spoon Knife and Fork Set, Service for 4, Easy Clean/Dishwasher Safe
features: 【Service for 4 People】BEWOS 16pcs Matt black cutlery set include 4 dinner knives, 4 dinner spoons, 4 dinner forks and 4 teaspoons which makes a great choice for every family.
【Health and Durable】Matte black silverware set is made of quality food grade stainless steel which ensure health and durability, non toxic, nickel free, corrosion resistant and dishwasher safe.
【Superior Design】Classy looking with concise design handle, smooth surface make these utensils always remain glossy, which will make your table settings elegant and different.

【Exquisite Craft and Good Grip】This stainless steel tableware has a sturdy construction, no need to worry about bending, not too heavy and flimsy. The flatware set with no rough spots that ensures the safety of your lips, appropriate thickness and weight is suitable for both adults and children.Delicately design can provide you with a good grip.

【Multi-purpose】These cutlery sets are perfect for family daily use, also suitable for restaurant, hotel, festivals, wedding, travelling, camping, party, catering, etc. If you have problems with our cutlery, please don’t hesitate to contact us so that we can satisfy your satisfaction.
description: Product Description BEWOS 16-piece matte black flatware set is made of 18/0 stainless steel. The cutlery set service for 4 people , containing 4 dinner knives/ dinner forks/ dinner spoons/ dessert spoons, which makes a great choice for most families. Every detail of the tableware set has been delicately designed and produced. The elegant matte black cutlery has the advantage of sturdiness and durability, which will play an importance in your daily meal. Ergonomic Design The kitchen silverware features Simple elegant design with no superfluous patterns will maintain timeless beauty so that it is perfect for any casual or formal occasion. Healthy & Durability Cutlery sets are crafted from high quality food grade stainless steel. non toxic and nickel free, healthy and durable make sure that it can be used for years. Sharp dinner knife to cut food more efficiently such as steak ,butter and so on. Dishwasher Safe The tableware set is dishwasher safe and easy to clean. It still keeps bright after cleaning ,which can be used for a long time as long as you maintain it properly. Why choose our cutlery set? This spoon knife fork set is made of 18/0 stainless steel, without other chemical coating treatment, no rusting and completely corrosion resistant. Each piece silverware is ergonomically designed with Smooth edges and no rough spots so that ensures the safety of your mouth. The surface of the tableware adopts a matte design,, combining traditional with modern aesthetics. Elegant and simple designed will be impress when friends come over for dinner. Flatware set has sturdy construction with density 7.75g/cm3,not bend easily or break, which will enhance your dining experience. We except our dinnerware to meet your dining requirements. 16 piece cutlery sets for four people include： 23 cm Dinner knives x 4 20.3 cm Dinner forks x 4 20.3 cm Dinner spoons x 4 14.1 cm Tea spoons x 4 Warm Prompt Please do not leave silverware in salt water or damp place for too long,as it may increases the chances of discoloration and corrosion. Please do not use harsh detergents, steel wool, scouring pads or sharp objects to avoid scratches. After using the stainless steel cutlery, please wipe it Immediately and keep dry for its durability.
